heading: Trust Fund transfers to Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Trust Fund
label: 1320e–2 Trust Fund transfers to Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Trust Fund
notes: References in TextThe Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified generally to Title 26, Internal Revenue Code.

children.text: For fiscal year 2013, an amount equal to $1 multiplied by the average number of individuals entitled to benefits under part A, or enrolled under part B, of subchapter XVIII during such fiscal year.

For each of fiscal years 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, and 2019, an amount equal to $2 multiplied by the average number of individuals entitled to benefits under part A, or enrolled under part B, of subchapter XVIII during such fiscal year.

children.heading: Adjustments for increases in health care spending
children.label: b Adjustments for increases in health care spending

children.text: such dollar amount for the previous fiscal year, multiplied by
the percentage increase in the projected per capita amount of National Health Expenditures, as most recently published by the Secretary before the beginning of the fiscal year.
